author: Murat Eren
content: The transformation framing is refreshing. It makes the history feel stranger and more useful than the usual collapse story.

author: Ayse Demir
content: The piece is careful about not turning attachment language into labels. That restraint makes it more humane.

author: Deniz Arman
content: The section on attention feels practical rather than ornamental. I like that Stoicism is treated as practice, not personality branding.

author: Selin Kaya
content: This makes the case for durability without turning restraint into nostalgia. The distinction between reach and residue is especially useful.
